intro: Cremastosperma pendulum, commonly known as the pendulous crema, is a species of flowering plant in the family Annonaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine, and its extracts have been found to possess various health benefits, including antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The bioactive constituents of Cremastosperma pendulum include alkaloids, phenolic compounds, and flavonoids, which contribute to its therapeutic effects. The most common herbal preparations made from this plant include teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma.
